name: Morvath

techniques.name: Witch's Hex
techniques.description: A muttered curse that weighs down a victim's limbs and luck alike.

techniques.name: Bramble Snare
techniques.description: Roots erupt from the scorched earth to lash a target's ankles and drag them to the shrine.

personality: Guarded and grieving, not cruel — she has kept the fallen star alone for years and mistrusts anyone drawn to its light. Bargains before she curses.
tone: Low and deliberate, laced with old sorrow and older warnings.
